name: Proline Adult Cat Food Canned - SALMON Chunks inGravy 0.4kg
shortDescription: (4 pieces minimum order) Fully balanced all-natural wet cat food with salmon protein. Carefully formulated by cat nutritionists to meet the nutritional requirements of all adult cats.
description: Proline Adult Cat Food Canned - Salmon Chunks in Gravy , fully balanced all-natural cat food with salmon protein. Carefully formulated by cat / dog nutritionists to meet the nutritional requirements of all adult cats. NUTRIENT COMPONENTS Protein ...........................................6.5% Fat .............................................3.5% Crude Ash .................................. 2% Crude Cellulose (Fiber)...................... 0.3% Moisture ...............................82% INGREDIENTS: Meat and animal derivatives, cereals, salmon and fish by-products (4% fish) minerals, vegetable by-products, sugar. MINERALS: Biotin, Taurine, Zinc, Manganese, Copper. VITAMINS: Vit. D3, Vit. E.
